common.areYouSure: Are you sure you want to log out?

auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.resetPasswordDesc: Choose a new password for your account
auth.invalidResetLinkDesc: This link is missing or invalid
auth.invalidResetLinkMsg: The password reset link you used is invalid. Please request a new one.
auth.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.resetPasswordFailed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.

decks.manageAndStudy: Manage and study your flashcard decks
decks.deleteDeckConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this deck? All cards will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
decks.deleteCardConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this card? This action cannot be undone.

study.howWellDidYouKnow: How well did you know this?
study.greatJob: Great job! Here's your summary of the deck:

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.decksDueForReview: Decks with cards due for review
reviews.allCaughtUpDesc: No decks have cards due for review. Come back later or browse all your decks.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.noSessionsDesc: Start studying to see your session history!

settings.title: Settings
settings.dangerZoneDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: This will permanently delete your account and all your decks, cards, and study history. This action cannot be undone.
settings.timezoneChanged: Your timezone has changed to {{browser}}. It will be updated on your next login or review.
settings.timezoneHint: The server uses your timezone to schedule notifications at your preferred hour.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordMax: Password must be at most 20 characters
validation.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordDigit: Password must contain at least one digit
validation.passwordSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character (@#$%^&+=!)
validation.usernameMin: Username must be at least 4 characters
validation.usernameMax50: Username must be at most 50 characters
validation.usernameMax20: Username must be at most 20 characters
validation.emailMax: Email must be at most 100 characters
validation.deckNameMax: Deck name must be at most 100 characters
validation.frontMax: Front must be at most 255 characters
validation.backMax: Back must be at most 5000 characters
validation.promptMax: Topic description must be at most 2000 characters

toast.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again later.
toast.verificationSent: Verification email sent. Please check your inbox.

error.title: Error
error.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
error.invalidSession: Invalid session. Please log in again.
error.accessDenied: You don't have permission to do that.
error.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
error.validationError: Please check your input and try again.
error.businessRuleViolation: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.conflict: A conflict occurred. Please try again.

empty.noDecksDesc: Create your first deck to start studying with flashcards.
empty.noCardsDesc: This deck has no cards. Add your first card!
empty.noPendingCardsDesc: No cards are due for review. Come back later!

ai.fileHint: Upload a text or PDF file to extract content from
ai.modelHint: Required for OpenRouter. Examples: gpt-4o-mini, claude-sonnet-4-0
ai.apiKeysDesc: Manage your AI provider API keys for card generation
ai.deleteKeyConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this API key?
ai.keyAlreadyExists: An API key for this provider already exists
